---
title: "sv_engine.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\sterileAgent\.agent\scripts\sv_engine.py"
loc: 212
complexity: 38
logic_score: 4.00
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 1.59
overall_score: 1.35
---

## Intent
The `sv_engine.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_separator, box_bottom, progress_bar, SovereignVector, __init__, _load_json, _load_thesaurus, tokenize, expand_query, add_skill, build_index, _vectorize, similarity, search, load_skills_from_dir. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_separator, box_bottom, progress_bar, SovereignVector, __init__, _load_json, _load_thesaurus, tokenize, expand_query, add_skill, build_index, _vectorize, similarity, search, load_skills_from_dir. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [math](file://math)
- [json](file://json)
- [re](file://re)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [os](file://os)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)

### Exports
- `SovereignHUD`
- `box_top`
- `box_row`
- `box_separator`
- `box_bottom`
- `progress_bar`
- `SovereignVector`
- `__init__`
- `_load_json`
- `_load_thesaurus`
- `tokenize`
- `expand_query`
- `add_skill`
- `build_index`
- `_vectorize`
- `similarity`
- `search`
- `load_skills_from_dir`
